name: Honeymoon Sourdough Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Turn the mixture out onto a floured board and knead lightly.
3. Roll out the dough gently and cut into biscuits.
4. Brush the biscuits lightly with melted butter or margarine.
5. Place them on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15 minutes.
